# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
24621/tcp open  ftp           FileZilla ftpd 1.5.1
| ssl-cert: Subject: commonName=filezilla-server self signed certificate
| Not valid before: 2022-11-29T21:31:27
|_Not valid after:  2023-11-30T21:36:27
| ftp-syst: 
|_  SYST: UNIX emulated by FileZilla.
|_ssl-date: TLS randomness does not represent time
```

---

# Enumeration

- VM14の[[tftp- 69(udp)]]列挙の結果入手した認証情報で接続してみる
```sh
──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM18]
└─$ ftp $TargetIP 24621
Connected to 192.168.222.226.
220-FileZilla Server 1.5.1
220 Please visit https://filezilla-project.org/
Name (192.168.222.226:koshi): ftp_jp
331 Please, specify the password.
Password: 
230 Login successful.
Remote system type is UNIX.
Using binary mode to transfer files.
ftp> ls
229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||63862|)
150 Starting data transfer.
drwxrwxrwx 1 ftp ftp               0 Nov 30  2022 aspnet_client
-rw-rw-rw- 1 ftp ftp             703 Nov 29  2022 iisstart.htm
-rw-rw-rw- 1 ftp ftp           99710 Nov 29  2022 iisstart.png
-rw-rw-rw- 1 ftp ftp              74 Dec 01  2022 security.txt
drwxrwxrwx 1 ftp ftp               0 Nov 29  2022 umbraco
226 Operation successful
ftp> 
```

- 入手できるすべてのファイルを入手し、grepで認証情報を探索
```sh

```
